calendar.matters:
First Amended Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar May-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER TERRA CONLON, ALISON BIGGS' First Amended Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is GRANTED. Petitioner is awarded $2,000 for attorneys' fees. (Civil Code 8488(c).) Petitioner's request for costs is denied. Petitioner does not provide authority showing that they are entitled to recover the filing fee. No opposition filed.

A proposed order is submitted by email for the Court's review.

Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/CFH)

Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Eric Schaffer, Esq. 925--939-5300 Bowie & Schaffer for Petitioner.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Petitioner argues delay in e-filing, gave notice to opposing side, per statue still timely and in compliance. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is DENIED without prejudice.

Pursuant to Civil Code 8488(a), at the hearing both (1) the petition and (2) the issue of compliance with the service and date for hearing requirements are deemed controverted by the claimant. The petitioner has the burden of proof as to the issue of compliance with the service and date for hearing requirements.

Petitioners failed to comply with Civil Code 8486(a). The Petition was filed on February 18, 2022. Petitioners filed a Notice of Hearing on March 9, 2022 with a hearing date of April 11, 2022- a date more than 30 days after the filing of the petition.

Petitioners failed to comply with Civil Code 8118(b). There is no declaration containing documentation showing that payment was made to mail the notice using certified mail, or any other type of documentation of the sort.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/CFH)
